Master Mandarin Pinyin

Learn Chinese pronunciation through interactive soundboards and scientifically-designed quizzes.

🔊 Try Soundboard 🎮 Start Quizzes

YouTube Learning Resources

▶ ChineseClass101 - Greetings ▶ Yoyo Chinese - Polite Expressions ▶ Mandarin Corner - Self Introduction ▶ GoEast Mandarin - Common Questions ▶ ChinesePod - Everyday Conversations ▶ Everyday Chinese - Essential Phrases ▶ ChineseClass101 - Numbers ▶ Yoyo Chinese - Restaurant Chinese ▶ Mandarin Corner - Directions ▶ ChineseClass101 - Shopping ▶ Yoyo Chinese - Weather ▶ ChinesePod - Health ▶ GoEast Mandarin - Hotel ▶ Everyday Chinese - Feelings ▶ Yoyo Chinese - Family ▶ ChineseClass101 - Emergency ▶ Mandarin Corner - Small Talk ▶ GoEast Mandarin - Tech ▶ ChinesePod - Transportation ▶ Mandarin Corner - Dating

Why Pinyin Matters

Pinyin is the romanization system for Mandarin Chinese. Mastering pinyin pronunciation—especially the four tones—is crucial for clear communication and avoiding embarrassing mix-ups (like saying "horse" instead of "mother").

Pedagogically Validated Approach

  • Audio-first learning: Listen before speaking, just like native learners
  • Minimal pairs drills: Distinguish confusing sounds (shi vs si, an vs ang)
  • Progressive difficulty: Start simple, build to complex syllables
  • Spaced repetition: Active recall through quizzes improves retention

Ready to begin? Start with the soundboard →
